title: CLOTHING ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SOCIETY OF ST VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIAL SERVICES OF BEND CLOTHING ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a seasonal clothing rack with slightly used coats and clothing. Offers $25 clothing vouchers to the local store, SuperThrift (one time per family per year). Also offers socks, underwear, blankets, and pillows when available. 950 SE 3rd Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Clothing: Men, women, and children in need of clothing to protect against the cold Clothing Vouchers: Age 18 and older; one per year, per family Hours: Monday 2pm-6pm, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 389-6643 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 389-6643 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in and speak to a receptionist to sign up FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Alfalfa, Bend, Powell Butte, Sunriver, Three Rivers, Tumalo, and zip codes 97701, 97703 SITE HOURS: Monday 2pm-6pm, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-2pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Across from Chan's Chinese Restaurant Services: Clothing Vouchers Winter Clothing Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - ID AND DRIVERS LICENSE ASSISTANCE FOOD - FOOD ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOCIETY OF ST VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIAL SERVICES OF BEND
